title: MCPins
description: MCPins is the location mapping app for fans of Minecraft SMP, single-player survival, forever worlds, towns and nations, factions or anarchy.
body:
MCPins helps you track important locations as you explore and conquer your Minecraft world. For fans of SMP, single-player survival, forever worlds, towns and nations, factions or anarchy—MCPins is your waypoint coordinates log without the coffee stains. 

The MCPins Fabric mod allows you to quickly add pins to your MCPins maps from within Minecraft using our /pin command. Requires an account at [mcpins.app](https://mcpins.app/).

**How to Get Started**
- First, create a free account at [MCPins](https://mcpins.app/)
- Then, follow the instructions [here](https://mcpins.app/fabric)

MCPins Home - https://mcpins.app
